ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the game */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date the player last played the game */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., Developer, Analyst, Content Creator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the player's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level played */,
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rank achieved */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the player has played this level */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved in the session */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the level (in minutes and seconds) */,
  "rings_collected" INTEGER /* Number of rings collected during the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date when the session occurred */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., Completed, Incomplete, Failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_sessions_rank_id FOREIGN KEY ("rank_id") REFERENCES rank_definitions ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_sessions_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level (e.g., Easy, Medium, Hard) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "unlock_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions required to unlock the level */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score that can be achieved in the level */,
  "max_rings" INTEGER /* Maximum number of rings that can be collected in the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rank_definitions" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the rank */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rank */,
  "score_range" TEXT /* Score range required to achieve the rank */,
  "badge_image" TEXT /* Image of the badge associated with the rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_details" (
  "session_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session detail */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., checkpoint, power-up, enemy encounter) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event (in minutes and seconds) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Additional data related to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_details_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES player_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who earned the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., badge, power-up, in-game currency) */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_date" TEXT /* Date when the reward was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the player */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the player in the leaderboard */,
  "leaderboard_date" TEXT /* Date when the leaderboard was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., total players, total sessions, total score) */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "level_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level */,
  "progress_status" TEXT /* Status of the player's progress (e.g., In Progress, Completed, Failed) */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date when the progress was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_level_progress_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_level_progress_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "analytics_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics (e.g., time spent, score achieved, rings collected) */,
  "analytics_value" INTEGER /* Value of the analytics */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_analytics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES player_sessions ("session_id")
)
